name: Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup skim milk, at room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Prepare a 9-inch square pan with cooking spray and flour.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine the flour, sugar, cornstarch, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, ginger, and nutmeg.
4. In another mixing bowl, combine the milk, egg whites, corn syrup, and vanilla.
5. Mix dry ingredients with wet ingredients just until moistened.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
